name: shrug
title: SHRUG — Socioeconomic High-resolution Rural-Urban Geographic Platform
description: Open-access platform with socioeconomic, environmental, and geospatial data for 500,000+ Indian villages and 8,000+ towns, spanning 25 years. Includes census demographics, economic census, nighttime lights, forest cover, elections, and open boundary polygons.

sources.name: Development Data Lab
sources.authority: Sam Asher (Johns Hopkins SAIS) & Paul Novosad (Dartmouth College)
